title: Junior Business Development Manager at REA India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at REA India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? REA India in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About REA India:
REA India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with REA India!
